articles.title: Drone strike hits Dubai airport, a major global hub, sparking huge fire - The Washington Post
articles.description: Iranian drones have repeatedly hit Dubai International Airport, among the world’s busiest, since the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran, but Monday’s strike was the largest.

articles.description: An official says the Iranian women’s soccer team has yet to reveal plans to leave Malaysia after five of the seven squad members who created a diplomatic furor by accepting asylum in Australia a week ago have rejoined their teammates in Kuala Lumpur. The team…

articles.title: Selection Sunday: Duke No. 1 overall in men's tournament, UConn women get top seed - NPR
articles.description: Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.
